reviews.review_description: Cute detective adventure! It's animied a little more towards children but I'm pretty satisfied with the experience.  Good value for price.

This is the game I've been waiting for. The only drawback is that voice recognition is not yet complete.
I look forward to the next game.
Crap voice recognition doesn't work and starts from beginning each time. Waste of money

I have purchased this game and ttoreing adventure 2 an neither of them recognised my voice, the microphone comes up and just sits there and you can do nothing only exit the games. I would prefer a refund to something worth while.
I can’t it to recognize my voice or hear me at all. I can’t get past saying hello. The beginning is way too long and boring. Going to ask for a refund.

reviews.review_title: DO NOT BUY! Voice Recognition is faulty
reviews.review_description:
The Voice Recognition does not work in this game but it looked like it had so much potential. The very first scene requires you to respond with “Hello”, none of the 4 members in my family could get it to recognize one of our “Hello”s, so I submitted for a refund. 

Facebook’s policy is that you can receive a refund IF you submit within a certain window from purchase AND if you use the app for less than 30 minutes. I requested the refund on Day 1 but unfortunately we spent more than 30 minutes working with settings, mic volume, headset positioning, etc. 

Of course; Facebook is sitting there saying “Had you have read the reviews, you would have notice that we were selling an app that doesn’t work. Had you not have wasted 45 minutes of your time, trying to make something we sell work, you could have gotten you money back... but tough luck”. 

Thank you Facebook for selling a broken app on your platform and then offering ZERO support to those who purchase broken items through your platform. Great customer service.
